results.name: specter ability
results.description: Damaging the opponent strips cards out of their hand.

results.name: speed demons
results.description: A racing team comprised of possessed survivors from Duskmourn under Valgavoth's orders. Not to be confused with the [Speed Demon](/tags/artwork/speed-demon).

results.name: speed matters
results.description: Effects that care about speed directly, other than max speed.

results.name: spiderfolk
results.description: Actual anthropomorphic spiders. Not to be confused with [spider people](spider-people-marvel), which is the tag for the various multiversal variants of everyone's favourite friendly neighborhood superhero.

results.name: spider-man
results.description: A superhero identity shared by multiple spider-themed vigilantes.

results.name: spider-people (marvel)
results.description: The various multiversal variants of everyone's favourite friendly neighborhood superhero. Not to be confused with [spiderfolk](spiderfolk), which is the tag for actual anthropomorphic spiders.

results.name: spider-woman
results.description: Spider-themed superhero alter ego of Jessica Drew and, for a time, Martha Franklin. Not to be confused with [Ghost-Spider](ghost-spider), the Spider-Woman of Earth-65.

results.name: spinal centipede
results.description: Phyrexian centipedes that crawl into a corpse's mouth and turn it into a zombie

results.name: spirit animal
results.description: Arts evoking Native American spirit animal imagery.

results.name: spit
results.description: That stuff mouths make. Also the action of propelling it!

results.name: spite damage
results.description: When you deal me damage, I deal you damage right back.

results.name: splits on death
results.description: Cards with abilities that create multiple creature tokens when a creature dies.

results.name: spongebob squarepants
results.description: He lives in a pineapple under the sea.

results.name: spot removal
results.description: Removal for one target specifically.  See also [sweeper](sweeper) and [multi removal](multi-removal).

results.name: spriggan
results.description: Green/Blue aligned Goblins from Shadowmoor, capable of growing to great sizes
